entity.summary: United Kingdom-based cryptocurrency exchange that entered beta on July 21, 2014, relaunched with the LazyPay merchant and wallet initiative in early 2015, and later received broader official-launch publicity. HEI retains inactive status because no definitive shutdown announcement or terminal operating date has been established.
entity.notes: The existing beta launch, January 2015 relaunch, and March 2015 official-launch publicity events are not duplicated. Historical operation is well supported, but the reviewed evidence does not establish one clean permanent-shutdown marker. Keep inactive rather than forcing dead classification.

expected.summary: United Kingdom-based cryptocurrency exchange associated with lazycoins.com, publicly visible in 2014, relaunched around early 2015, and later no longer evidenced as an active exchange in the current public record set.
expected.notes: HEI models LazyCoins as inactive rather than dead because the current evidence set has strong historical launch / operation references but does not establish a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date. Launch date uses the 2014-07-21 beta-launch marker from the public Bitcointalk announcement title. Later reporting describes a relaunch / official launch in early 2015.

evidence.title: LazyCoins beta launch announcement
evidence.notes: Public announcement thread preserving the July 21, 2014 beta-launch marker.

evidence.title: LazyCoins Launching LazyPay Mobile Wallet and Merchant App
evidence.notes: Contemporary report describing the exchange relaunch and planned LazyPay expansion.

evidence.title: LazyCoins Launches Intending to Be the Exchange That People Just Trust
evidence.notes: Contemporary official-launch coverage supporting active operation in early 2015.
